name: Calm Cards - Klondike
short_description: Purchasing this game lets you play the age old solitaire/klondike game in a beautiful setting without stress. There are no scores or leader boards, just gorgeous cards to play with.
detailed_description:
This classic game is made with care and thought. With focus on atmosphere the sound and environment work together to give you a relaxing round of cards.
You also have the options to tweak the game to your liking in the menu.

Calm Cards – Klondike has a meditative quality to it and helps you to slow down.
Keep your mind off other things for a while, recharge your energy and regain your focus.

The game contains:
– Beautiful and smooth animations
– Animated forest background
– Relaxing music
– Soothing sounds of forest birds
– Traditional or enlarged card illustrations
– Draw 1 or 3 cards from the deck

The game is free from:
-Ads
-In-app purchases
-Leaderboards
-Stress
